steps.name: bootstrap
steps.summary: Next.js 15 + TypeScript strict + Tailwind bootstrapped with full directory scaffold, env.example, vitest config, and all AC checks passing

steps.name: env-validation
steps.summary: src/lib/env.ts parses process.env through Zod, throws with missing key names on import; clientEnv exports only NEXT_PUBLIC_* keys; 4 tests passing

steps.name: supabase-schema
steps.summary: 0001_init.sql migration creates all tables + enums + indices; admin.ts and client.ts typed against Database; seed.sql inserts one patient, one prescription, three inventory items, one spending rule; typecheck passes
